# MigOculto

MigOculto is a Brazilian app for organizing amigo secreto online, also known as amigo oculto, secret santa and amigo doce.

The product helps people create groups, invite participants, run a private draw, manage wishlists, exchange anonymous messages, send reminders and prepare the reveal moment.

Primary pages:
- https://migoculto.com.br/
- https://migoculto.com.br/politica-de-privacidade

Primary topics:
- amigo secreto online
- app de amigo secreto
- sorteio de amigo secreto
- organizar amigo secreto
- amigo oculto online
- amigo doce
- amigo secreto de Natal
- amigo secreto para empresas
- lista de desejos amigo secreto

Contact is available through the official website footer.
